text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, shortly before the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right, let's see how things look tonight.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Recently, a lot of Umamusume have been out
practicing even after lights out. I have to keep my
eye on them so they don't get hurt.)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Ardan! I thought it was you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, if it isn't Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's lights out soon, so you might want to get
started on your cooldown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You're right. It's about time I called it a night.
Thanks for taking your duty as disciplinary
committee leader so seriously.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I heard you're about ready to return
to racing! Congrats! No wonder you're still
training at this hour.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You must be excited to race against Yaeno and
everyone again! I can't wait to watch you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You're... too kind.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Are you feeling okay, Ardan? You're usually
more... chipper.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You've got this unique power, Bamboo. You
always see the truth straight away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, something feels off about the way
I'm running, and it's got me worried.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Feels off how? Do you mean something's wrong
with your legs?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No... I fear it's something mental.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It started creeping up on me while I was
recovering, but it's more apparent now that I'm
back training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I speak of the gap between myself and Oguri—the
difference between the blinding light of those
who define their eras and the dim glow of those
who don't...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I still remember the kind things you said when I
started my time off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It made me truly determined to return to racing
so I could repay your kindness and support for my
dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: But then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I witnessed it with my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
An utterly incomparable, vivid radiance that
seems fated to burn itself into history.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now, if I wish to leave any trace of my own light,
it's not only my sister I must outshine, but also the
dizzying, newly formed aurora that is Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Once I came to understand that, a small voice in
the corner of my mind started whispering to me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It said the feeble light I have now will only
continue to dim.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I know I shouldn't give any mind or credence to
such weak, cowardly thoughts, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My legs, my body, and my heart are all so
leaden... and I... I can't take it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You're right, Oguri is something special. People are even saying that this is her era, and it's easy to see why when you look at her race results.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But even still...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Take it from me! Your dream is just as good as
hers! You're just as determined! There's nothing
inferior about you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I appreciate your kind words, but—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: THEY'RE NOT JUST WORDS!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I saw it in your face as you talked about your
dreams! I saw it in the way you ran at the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You were intense! Blinding! I wish I could be like
that! You're... SO DANG COOL!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That passion, that strength... That dream of yours belongs to you and only you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's why I know you have what it takes! You can
run! You can challenge Oguri! You can still chase
your dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Even if you don't believe in yourself...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I have a goal of my own. I'm aiming to
become the ultimate sprinter and miler.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Sprints and miles? Doesn't that mean...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I'll probably end up racing Oguri someday
too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not gonna let that scare me! I'm gonna
take her on head-to-head and come out on top!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Why? Because that's the road that leads to my
dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I want you to keep running toward
your dream too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'll be heading back to the dorm now. It's almost
lights out, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Have a good night.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Night, Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Guess I'd better warm up before
Trainer gets here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hello, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Do you have a minute to talk?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sure! What's up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Um... I was wondering if you could tell me what
race you'll be running in next.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I'm running in the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. In that case... Would you mind if I
came to spectate? I'd like to see for myself how
you run.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Really?! You'll come watch?! That would be
awesome! Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But why do you wanna watch one of my races all
of a sudden? Did you hear something about me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've touched upon my dream, I
thought I ought to see your dream in action as
well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I would love to see how your passion shows in the way you run.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Now that I can understand! Don't worry, I'll make absolutely sure you can feel my passion, determination, and dream in the stands!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
RAAAAAH! Now you've got me all fired up!
Watch out, Takamatsunomiya Kinen, 'cause I'm
coming to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Bamboo Memory takes another bold
step toward her dream.
